$schema: vocabulary drift gate: banned -> preferred, enforced by scripts/check-style.mjs

terms.note: Buyer-facing term names the guarantee. "ratchet" stays fine as the internal mechanism name. Grandfathered: the phrase is used in fixtures, tests, and site copy far too widely to migrate as a side effect of shipping this gate; the check name itself (modonome/gate-integrity) already carries the rename.
Ends the packet/work-item drift; "packet" is reserved for knowledge packets.
Pairs with Modonome Guard as the two-product brand spine.
Deferred rollout: grandfathered in scripts/check-style.mjs until the code-level rename lands.
